title: 10 Dividend Growth Stocks For December 2022
text: Welcome to the final edition of my monthly series of 10 Dividend Growth Stocks for 2022! In this article series, I rank a selection of dividend growth stocks in Dividend Radar and present the ten top-ranked stocks for further research and possible investment.

title: Reasons to Add Alliant Energy (LNT) to Your Portfolio Now
text: Alliant Energy (LNT) makes a strong case for investment, given its estimate revision history, earnings surprise history and systematic investments to strengthen its infrastructure and serve customers efficiently.

title: 3 Top Recession-Proof Stocks Likely to Rally in 2023
text: As the Fed and weak economic data sparks recession fears, investing in defensive stocks like NextEra Energy (NEE), Alliant Energy (LNT) & The Chef's Warehouse (CHEF) for steady returns seems prudent.
